name: Intersection
summary: The Intersection class contains methods for calculating intersections between geometric objects.

methods.name: LineSegmentToObb
methods.signature: public static LineSegment LineSegmentToObb(LineSegment lineSegment, OBB obb)
methods.summary: Returns a new line segment which is an intersection of the given line segment and the oriented bounding box or null if the line segment and oriented bounding box do not intersect.

params.name: obb
params.doc: Oriented bounding box to be used.

returns.doc: The intersection line segment or null if no intersection was found.

methods.name: LineSegmentToPlane
methods.signature: public static Point LineSegmentToPlane(LineSegment lineSegment, GeometricPlane plane)
methods.summary: Returns a new point which is an intersection of the given line segment and plane or null if the line segment and the plane are parallel or do not intersect.

params.name: lineSegment
params.doc: The line segment to be used.

returns.doc: The intersection point or null if no intersection was found.

methods.name: LineToLine
methods.signature: public static LineSegment LineToLine(Line line1, Line line2)
methods.summary: Returns a new line segment which is the shortest path between the given lines or null if the lines are parallel. If the resulting line segment has a length of 0.0, the given lines actually intersect in 3d space.

params.name: line1
params.doc: The first line to be used.

params.name: line2
params.doc: The second line to be used.

returns.doc: The shortest line segment between the given lines or null if the lines are parallel.

methods.name: LineToObb
methods.signature: public static LineSegment LineToObb(Line line, OBB obb)
methods.summary: Returns a new line segment which is an intersection of the given line and the oriented bounding box or null if the line and oriented bounding box do not intersect.

params.name: obb
params.doc: Oriented bounding box to be used.

returns.doc: The intersection line segment or null if no intersection was found.

methods.name: LineToPlane
methods.signature: public static Point LineToPlane(Line line, GeometricPlane plane)
methods.summary: Returns a new point which is an intersection of the given line and plane or null if the line and the plane are parallel.

returns.doc: The intersection point or null if no intersection was found.

methods.name: PlaneToPlane
methods.signature: public static Line PlaneToPlane(GeometricPlane plane1, GeometricPlane plane2)
methods.summary: Returns a new line which is an intersection of the given two planes or null if the planes are parallel.

params.name: plane1
params.doc: The first plane to be used.

params.name: plane2
params.doc: The second plane to be used.

returns.doc: The intersection line or null if no intersection was found.
